description:
Building 49, Royal Arsenal, forms part of one of Woolwich’s most iconic riverside developments, blending historic military architecture with contemporary living. Set within the prestigious Royal Arsenal estate, this former military building has been sympathetically converted to offer boutique apartments with striking character, including exposed brickwork and original features, alongside the convenience of modern design and resident facilities.

This immaculately presented split-level apartment is arranged over two floors and offers a well-balanced layout. Upon entry at ground floor level, the property provides access to two generous double bedrooms, both well-proportioned, with the principal bedroom benefiting from a stylish en-suite shower room. A separate modern family bathroom serves the second bedroom and guests.

The upper level opens into a stunning open-plan living space, ideal for both relaxing and entertaining. This area is rich in character, featuring exposed brickwork, original timber beams and large windows that allow for plenty of natural light. The high-specification kitchen is fully fitted with integrated appliances and finished to an excellent standard, seamlessly connecting with the living and dining areas. The property is offered furnished on a long let basis.

The property is ideally positioned for excellent transport links, with Woolwich Arsenal DLR and Woolwich Arsenal Station both within easy reach, providing direct access to Canary Wharf, the City and Central London via the Elizabeth line. Numerous bus routes also serve the area, making commuting and travel highly convenient.

Royal Arsenal benefits from a vibrant and evolving local area, with a range of amenities including riverside walks along the Thames, independent cafés, restaurants and shops, as well as larger retail options nearby. The Royal Arsenal development itself offers a strong sense of community, enhanced by on-site facilities such as a concierge service and residents’ gym (subject to subscription), making it an increasingly popular choice for professionals seeking both lifestyle and connectivity.
title: Apartment
agency: Urban Spaces, Loft Living & Unique Properties Estate Agent Logo

description:
Welcome to your brand new home in Gilham House, a stunning part of the exciting Lombard Square development by Berkeley Homes. Being the very first to live in this beautiful two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment means you get to enjoy a fresh, modern space designed for easy living. The property comes fully furnished and includes fantastic perks like a private balcony, secure parking available at extra cost, and access to wonderful resident facilities such as a 24-hour concierge, a welcoming lounge, an on-site gym, and lovely communal gardens.

Living here places you in a growing and friendly neighborhood in South East London. Right inside the development, you will find a beautiful 1.8-acre four seasons park with lovely green spaces to relax in. You are also just a short walk from the popular Royal Arsenal Riverside, which is a fantastic local hotspot filled with great pubs, charming cafes, and cultural venues like Woolwich Works. Whether you want a quiet afternoon outdoors or a fun weekend brunch, everything is close by.

Getting around London is wonderfully simple from this location. You are just a 4-minute walk to Plumstead Station, which connects you to Southeastern and Thameslink services. If you prefer the fast new trains, Woolwich Station is only a 10-minute walk away, putting you straight onto the Elizabeth Line for incredibly quick trips to Canary Wharf, the City, and the West End. With such a beautiful home and amazing travel links, you will want to get in touch for a viewing right away.

Estimated Travel Time to Universities:
UCL (University College London): ~25 mins
LSE (London School of Economics): ~25 mins
King's College London (Waterloo Campus): ~30 mins
Imperial College London: ~35 mins

Contact LondonPropertyGuru today to book a viewing!

description:
A modern and spacious two-bedroom apartment set on the 7th floor of the sought-after Wellington Quarter development in Woolwich. Finished to a high standard throughout and offered fully furnished, the property provides contemporary living in one of South East London’s fastest-growing locations.

Spanning approximately 795 ft2, the apartment offers a bright open-plan living and dining area leading onto a private balcony with impressive elevated views. The sleek fitted kitchen comes complete with integrated appliances including an induction hob, oven, fridge freezer, and washing machine. Both bedrooms are well-proportioned.

Residents benefit from being within easy reach of Woolwich town centre, with a wide range of shops, cafés, restaurants, supermarkets, and local amenities nearby. Woolwich Arsenal Station is just a short walk away, offering excellent transport connections via the DLR, National Rail, and Elizabeth Line, with fast access to Canary Wharf, Central London, and Heathrow Airport.

description:
John Payne are delighted to bring to the market this tenth floor, two bedroom two bathroom apartment located in the highly sought after Love Lane development in the heart of Woolwich. 

The property benefits from a 21ft open plan kitchen reception room with wood laminate flooring and door to balcony. The kitchen is fitted with a range of modern wall and base units with complimentary work surfaces. Integrated appliances. There are two double bedrooms, the master with built in storage, an en-suite shower room and access onto the balcony. The second double bedroom has carpet as fitted and access to the balcony also. Off of the spacious entrance hall you will find a three piece modern bathroom fitted with a white three piece suite comprising a tiled sided bath cistern enclosed WC and wash hand basin.

Externally there is a 31ft balcony covering the width of the apartment overlooking Woolwich Town Centre.

Further benefits include 24 hour security/ concierge service. 

Just few minutes’ walk to Woolwich Arsenal Station for Thameslink, Southeastern lines and DLR as well as the luxury river boat and easy access to Woolwich ferry. The Elizabeth line/Crossrail is just a short stroll away for direct access into Canary Wharf (7 mins), Liverpool Street (14 mis) and Bond Street (21 mins).

The vibrant high street is on your door step with a Tesco superstore and 24 hour gym beneath your apartment and various local shopping facilities including traditional market stalls, eateries, coffee shops and high street shops. You will also benefit from the Royal Arsenal Riverside restaurants, bars and fortnightly farmers markets.

description:
** Zero Deposit Guarantee Available **
MANN Lettings are pleased to bring this spacious two bedroom apartment to the market. The property benefits from a few luxuries, one of them being its proximity to train station - walking distance. Moving on to the property, it comprises of a large well-lit  open-plan lounge area fully furnished whith a dining table as well as a comforbale sofa. Both bedrooms are equiiped with standing wardrobes as well as ample space. With the property available now, call us now on  .

Woolwich remained a small Kentish village until it started to become a leading military and industrial town. It was home to the Woolwich Dockyard, the Royal Arsenal (dating back to 1471), the Royal Military Academy (1741) and the Royal Horse Artillery (1793); the town still retains an army base at the Royal Artillery Barracks (although 16RA Royal Artillery left in 2007, Woolwich Barracks still house the Royal Artillery Band and more recently Second Battalion Princess of Wales Royal Regiment and Kings Troop Royal Horse Artillery), and the Royal Artillery Museum, Firepower. 
Arsenal Football Club were founded in Woolwich in 1886 by workers at the Arsenal – the club were initially known as Dial Square, then Royal Arsenal and then became Woolwich Arsenal in 1891. They moved to Arsenal Stadium, Highbury in north London in 1913, and dropped the Woolwich prefix the following year. This is a rare example of a British football team moving from its local area, albeit relocating within the same conurbation. 
Woolwich Polytechnic founded in 1892, merged with other local colleges and became Thames Polytechnic in 1970. In 1992 it was granted university status as the University of Greenwich. In 2000, the University began a relocation to the Old Naval College, several miles to the west in Greenwich town centre, leaving only an administrative presence in Woolwich.
Woolwich was the start of the route of the last London tram, on 5 July 1952.A scheduled Route 40 tram, restricted to just a nominal number of fare paying passengers, was driven through enormous crowds to New Cross, finally arriving at New Cross depot around 1am on the 6 July. 
Woolwich is the location of the United Kingdom’s first branch of McDonald’s (the 3,000th in the world), which opened on 13 November 1974. Woolwich was chosen because it was considered to be a representative English town at the time

Once redevelopment of the former Royal Arsenal site began, Woolwich started to enjoy a renaissance. Several High Street chains previously absent from Woolwich have opened branches, and longer-established shops have been refurbished. The new terminus of the Docklands Light Railway’s London City Airport branch, Woolwich Arsenal station opened on 10 January 2009. 
A large-scale redevelopment of the area around Love Lane called Woolwich Central, near the eastern end of Powis Street, commenced in 2011. The project includes demolition of several buildings including the Post Office, Crown Building, Peggy Middleton House and Thomas Spencer Halls of Residence, and the construction of new council offices called the Woolwich Centre ( opened in August 2011 ) and housing, local shops and a large branch of Tesco (opened in November 2012). description:
Truepenny's are delighted to offer this beautifully presented two bedroom apartment located in the highly desirable Mast Quay development in SE18. The property provides a fantastic living space, ideal for those looking for a modern and spacious home with easy access to transport links and local amenities.

The property comprises a large living and dining area that exudes brightness and warmth. The living space is perfect for both relaxation and entertaining, offering ample room for a comfortable seating area and a dining table. The modern design of the room, coupled with the panoramic views from the windows, creates a perfect atmosphere for everyday living.

The kitchen is fully equipped with integrated appliances, including a fridge-freezer, oven and dishwasher. It offers a clean, contemporary design with plenty of counter space for meal preparation and ample storage options for all your kitchen essentials. Whether you enjoy cooking or simply appreciate a well-designed space, this kitchen will meet all your needs.

The apartment features two generously sized double bedrooms, both offering plenty of natural light and wardrobe space. The master bedroom benefits from its own en-suite bathroom, adding extra convenience and privacy. The en-suite is elegantly designed with modern fixtures and fittings, ensuring a relaxing and comfortable space to unwind. The second bathroom, which is equally well-appointed, offers a stylish main bathroom with a bathtub, perfect for families or guests.

For outdoor space, the apartment includes a private balcony, which offers stunning views of the surrounding area and is ideal for enjoying a morning coffee or evening drinks. Whether you're taking in the fresh air or just enjoying the view, this space adds an extra element to the apartment that is perfect for outdoor relaxation.

As part of a well-maintained development, the property is professionally managed, providing you with peace of mind and responsive support for any issues that may arise. Furthermore, the property offers secure parking, providing a safe and convenient place to park your vehicle. The development also benefits from a concierge desk and lift.

Additional benefits include a private parking space, an on-site concierge, and fantastic transport links, including bus links, the new Elizabeth Line, The DLR, Thameslink and overground services.

Viewing: By appointment via Truepenny’s.

address: Building 22, Cadogan Road, Royal Arsenal SE18
description:
Light & bright two bedroom apartment on the 3rd floor of an attractive period conversion, in the heart of this established  historic development, situated adjacent to the river, east of Greenwich and only a short walk from the Elizabeth Line. Two double bedrooms (master with en suite) west facing reception with low bearing windows, laminate flooring and an open plan kitchen with a range of integrated appliances. 

Area

The Royal Arsenal is a former munitions factory & storage facility with a history dating back to 1671, that is being tastefully transformed to provide a blend of converted & new build residential properties, together with a central open space, bars, restaurants and an hotel.

Beautifully landscaped, the builder has taken great care to create a development that is a pleasure to live in, rather than yet another sterile 'stack of boxes'. It retains a real sense of community yet retains a high degree of peace and tranquility, away from the 'big smoke'.

The development currently offers

* 24 Concierge & Security
* Four on site gyms
* Two Youngs "gastro pubs" The Dial Arch & The Guardhouse
* Salt Craft Beer & Pizzeria
* Sushi Bar
* Chinese restaurant
* Five on site cafés
* Two theatres
* Health Centre
* Chemist
* Dentist
* Tesco Express
* M&S Food Hall
* Sainsburys
* Dry Cleaning service
* Zipcar Car Sharing Club
* Fortnightly Farmers Market

Situated east of Greenwich, adjacent to Woolwich Town Centre (offering an array of main street shopping and a vibrant street market) the development is easily reached by road & rail.

The Elizabeth Line station is no more than a short stroll away, which offers a direct route to Canary Wharf in as little as 8 minutes, Liverpool Street in less than 15 minutes and London Bridge / Cannon Street) in approx. 25 minutes, via the Main Line.

London City Airport can also be reached in as little as 5 minutes via the DLR, with Stratford also accessible in approx. 20 minutes.

As far as nearby leisure is concerned, a short cab ride will take you to nearby Blackheath, Greenwich or, the O2 - where you will be spoilt for choice in terms of food, drink and nightlife.

As an alternative to the train or car, the Thames Clipper river bus service also docks immediately adjacent to the development and provides additional links with The O2, Greenwich, Canary Wharf, Tower Bridge, Blackfriars, The Southbank (Tate Modern) and beyond.

address: Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead, London, SE18
description:
Set just moments from the open green spaces of Plumstead Common, this beautifully presented two-bedroom maisonette offers stylish, contemporary living in a well-connected South East London location.

Key Features:

Two-bedroom maisonette

Ground floor position

Private balcony

Modern open-plan kitchen/living area

Fully integrated appliances including dishwasher

Wood flooring throughout

Stylish, refurbished interior

Furnished

Approx. 10 minutes to Woolwich DLR

Moments from Plumstead Common

The property has been thoughtfully refurbished and features wood flooring throughout, creating a clean and modern feel. At the heart of the home is a bright open-plan kitchen/living space, fully equipped with integrated appliances including a cooker, washing machine, fridge/freezer and dishwasher—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.

Both bedrooms are well-proportioned, complemented by a modern bathroom, while the added benefit of a private balcony provides a welcome outdoor escape.

Ideally positioned, the property is just a short walk from Woolwich DLR, offering fast and convenient access into Central London, Canary Wharf and beyond.

Offered furnished and available from May, this is an excellent opportunity for professionals or sharers seeking a well-finished home in a connected yet leafy setting.

description:

Perfectly located just 0.5 miles from to the Elizabeth Line and only 0.5 miles from Woolwich DLR and National Rail service. A short distance to the River Thames and Uber boat service. Woolwich town centre is also within a close reach for all shops and amenities.

description: Modern Two-Bedroom, Two-Bathroom Apartment to Let | Lombard Square, SE28 - Discover contemporary living in this beautifully presented two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment, ideally located within the sought-after Lombard Square development in SE28. Thoughtfully designed, this home combines comfort, style, and practicality in one of South East London’s newest and most vibrant neighbourhoods.The bright open-plan living space features premium finishes and opens onto a private balcony — perfect for relaxing after work or entertaining guests. The modern kitchen is fully fitted with integrated appliances and sleek cabinetry, offering both functionality and sophistication.The master bedroom benefits from a private ensuite and a built-in wardrobe, while the second bedroom is generously proportioned, ideal for family, guests, or a home office. The main bathroom is finished to a high contemporary standard.Residents of Lombard Square enjoy access to beautifully landscaped communal gardens, a 24-hour concierge service, and an optional on-site gym. With excellent transport links nearby — including Woolwich Arsenal Station and the Elizabeth Line — Canary Wharf, the City, and Central London are all easily accessible.This exceptional apartment offers a stylish and convenient base for modern London living with outstanding urban connectivity.

Spencer James Residential is an independent estate agency established in 2002 specialising in all aspects of residential lettings, sales and property management. We're serious about the pivotal role we play between our landlords and tenants; buyers and sellers.

Our clients are assured in the knowledge that we work under an approved code of practice, due to our memberships with recognised industry bodies including: the Association of Residential Lettings Agents (ARLA); the National Association of Estate Agents (NAEA); and the Property Ombudsman (Sales and Lettings).

title: Apartment
agency: Spencer James Residential, London Estate Agent Logo

description:
Brown & Brooke are excited to be able to market this stunning two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment, situated on the 9th floor of this contemporary building, moments from Elizabeth Line, DLR & National Rail stations, as well as sweeping views.
Upon entering the flat, you are greeted by a well-sized hallway, with ample storage, linking the rooms together. On the left hand side, you will find the contemporary kitchen, integrated with appliances and offering great storage space. Alongside this, boasting open plan living, linked is the lounge / diner, with direct balcony access and floor to ceiling windows, flooding the room with natural light.
Straight on from the hallway is the second bedroom, double in size and benefitting from a fitted wardrobe. An ideal guest bedroom, home office or whatever your heart desires!
On the right side of the flat, you'll find the main bathroom, with a lovely, sleek finish. As well as this, the master bedroom, ample in size, with direct access to the balcony through sliding doors, alongside the en-suite shower room, again contemporary in its finish.
Further benefits to the property include: being available in July, offered as furnished, lift access and a private, secure entry system. The location of the property is excellent - moments from Elizabeth Line, DLR & National Rail stations, situated in the heart of Woolwich with access to all nearby amenities.
Viewing is essential - contact us today to arrange yours.

description:
Introducing Mast Quay; a newly built collection of one, two and three bedroom apartments across two striking towers in the Royal Borough of Greenwich.

All apartments have been set to a high standard with quality fixtures and fittings. These contemporary homes provide spacious open-plan living with modern interior and wooden flooring throughout.  All residents benefit from the ease of having a washer, a dishwasher, an oven and a fridge-freezer built in, with large balconies offering far-reaching river and city views. The development offers communal garden, an on-site gym, concierge and secure car park.

Residents benefit from the Elizabeth Line, which is now operating, cutting journey times as well as boosting capacity and improving connections. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker
